wtf did bmw just seriously add a feature that DRASTICALLY slows the vehicle down?
let’s do the math:
indicator ≈ 15W electrical load (averaged over blink cycle)
alternator efficiency ≈ 55%
engine → alternator chain ≈ ~20% total efficiency
→ required mechanical power ≈ 15W / 0.20 = 75W
→ that’s ~0.10 hp LOST every time you blink
so every lane change = measurable performance drop. insane.
now scale it:
assume ~20 blinks/day × 3s each = 60s/day
→ 15W × (60 / 3600)h ≈ 0.25 Wh/day
→ ≈ 91 Wh/year ≈ 0.091 kWh/year
1L gasoline ≈ 8.9 kWh →
→ ~0.01 L/year (ideal) → ~0.04 L/year real (efficiency losses)
now take ~25 million BMWs on the road:
→ ~1,000,000 liters of fuel wasted PER YEAR
→ ~2,300 tons of CO₂
all because people might accidentally use their indicators.
this is honestly irresponsible engineering.
